allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/VideoCall/VideoCall.jsx','utf8'\); console.log\('Lines:', src.split\('\\n'\).length\); console.log\('Has Timer import:', src.includes\('Timer'\)\); console.log\('Has Warning import:', src.includes\('Warning'\)\); console.log\('Has formatElapsed:', src.includes\('formatElapsed'\)\); console.log\('Has confirmDialog:', src.includes\('confirmDialog'\)\); console.log\('Has elapsedSeconds:', src.includes\('elapsedSeconds'\)\); console.log\('Has remoteName:', src.includes\('remoteName'\)\); console.log\('Has animate-ping:', src.includes\('animate-ping'\)\);")
